active_lock: Governed Web / News / Reporting + UI / Commands Proof + Stress Test
scope: malformed widget payload and rapid-click/double-submit contract proof

covered_behaviors.evidence: renderUnsupportedWidgetEvent(msg) surfaces unsupported dashboard messages and says Nova did not treat them as success or execute anything.
unsupported widget fallback strings are present in both nova_backend/static/dashboard-chat-news.js and Nova-Frontend-Dashboard/dashboard-chat-news.js.
PR #124 dashboard rendering proof keeps empty degraded search widgets visible as Search state and renders Evidence state metadata.
sendChat blocks while waitingForAssistant or manualTurnInFlight is active.
lastAssistantTurnKey prevents repeated assistant text within an active manual turn.
pending confirmation helper accepts explicit yes/no/cancel only, and prior proof showed unrelated weather command can cancel stale website confirmation before continuing.

remaining_gaps: Browser Use screenshot/click-path proof remains blocked.
High-frequency browser click replay remains unproven.
Known non-search widget-specific field fuzzing remains partial beyond unsupported-message and safe-default contract coverage.
